capability_questions.capability_name: Service exists and is in good condition

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a cryptographic key management service?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether an enterprise key management service exists
questions.evaluation_focus: Enterprise cryptographic key management service exists

questions.prompt: Is the cryptographic key management service reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the key management service is reviewed on a regular cadence
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular cryptographic key management service efficacy review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise formalize and document KPIs and KRIs for cryptographic key management?
questions.evaluation_focus: Documented KPIs and KRIs

questions.prompt: Are cryptographic key management KPIs and KRIs reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate regular key management KPI review
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular KPI/KRI review

questions.prompt: Do KPIs track key rotation and expiry compliance across the enterprise?
questions.evaluation_focus: Key rotation and expiry compliance metrics

questions.prompt: Do KPIs measure HSM and cloud KMS coverage for sensitive keys?
questions.intent: Evaluate HSM and cloud KMS coverage metrics
questions.evaluation_focus: HSM and cloud KMS coverage metrics

questions.prompt: Do KPIs identify orphaned or unknown keys in the inventory?
questions.evaluation_focus: Orphaned and unknown key inventory metrics

questions.prompt: Does the organization have enterprise-wide cryptographic procedures and policies?
questions.evaluation_focus: Enterprise-wide cryptographic procedures and policies

questions.prompt: Does the organization have enterprise-wide key provisioning policies?
questions.evaluation_focus: Enterprise-wide key provisioning policies

questions.prompt: Does the organization have enterprise-wide key deprovisioning policies?
questions.evaluation_focus: Enterprise-wide key deprovisioning policies

questions.prompt: Are cryptographic and key management policies reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy?
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular policy and procedure review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a key management solution or cloud KMS to manage cryptographic keys?
questions.intent: Evaluate key management solution or cloud KMS
questions.evaluation_focus: Key management solution or cloud KMS for cryptographic keys

questions.prompt: Are high-value keys protected by HSM or hardware-backed key storage?
questions.evaluation_focus: HSM or hardware-backed key protection for high-value keys

questions.prompt: Does the key management system support automation for keys across the enterprise?
questions.evaluation_focus: Automation support for enterprise keys

questions.prompt: Is key management solution configuration reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular key management solution configuration review

questions.prompt: Does the key management solution integrate with data management and certificate management systems?
questions.evaluation_focus: Integration with data management and certificate management

questions.prompt: Are cryptographic keys stored securely (encrypted at rest, access-controlled, auditable)?
questions.evaluation_focus: Secure storage of cryptographic keys

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise define clear roles and responsibilities for CEK (cryptographic escrow key) management?
questions.evaluation_focus: Clear CEK management roles and responsibilities

questions.prompt: Does the organization have formalized documented processes for key provisioning and deprovisioning?
questions.intent: Evaluate formalized key provisioning and deprovisioning processes
questions.evaluation_focus: Formalized documented key provisioning process

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise use automation to provision keys?
questions.evaluation_focus: Automated key provisioning

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise use automation to deprovision keys when no longer needed?
questions.evaluation_focus: Automated key deprovisioning

questions.prompt: Are key provisioning and deprovisioning processes reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate regular provisioning and deprovisioning review
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular key provisioning and deprovisioning process review

questions.prompt: Does the organization have a formalized documented process for key rotation?
questions.evaluation_focus: Formalized documented key rotation process

questions.prompt: Does the key management system rotate keys automatically on a defined schedule?
questions.evaluation_focus: Automatic key rotation

questions.prompt: Are key rotation processes reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate regular key rotation process review
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular key rotation process review

questions.prompt: Does the organization have enterprise-wide key activation and deactivation processes?
questions.intent: Evaluate key activation and deactivation processes
questions.evaluation_focus: Enterprise-wide key activation and deactivation processes

questions.prompt: Are keys activated automatically when triggered from change management?
questions.intent: Evaluate automatic key activation from change management
questions.evaluation_focus: Automatic key activation from change management triggers

questions.prompt: Does the organization suspend keys based on compromise or security triggers?
questions.evaluation_focus: Key suspension based on compromise triggers

questions.prompt: Does the organization have enterprise-wide key archival and recovery policies?
questions.intent: Evaluate key archival and recovery policies
questions.evaluation_focus: Enterprise-wide key archival and recovery policies

questions.prompt: Are key archival and recovery automated where appropriate?
questions.intent: Evaluate automated key archival and recovery
questions.evaluation_focus: Automatic key archival and recovery

questions.prompt: Are key lifecycle state processes reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate regular lifecycle state process review
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular lifecycle state process review

questions.prompt: Does the organization have enterprise-wide key revocation processes and procedures?
questions.evaluation_focus: Enterprise-wide key revocation process and procedures

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise automate key revocation based on triggers like compromise or expiry?
questions.evaluation_focus: Automated key revocation based on triggers

questions.prompt: Does the organization have enterprise-wide key compromise policies?
questions.evaluation_focus: Enterprise-wide key compromise policies

questions.prompt: Does the organization remove or deprovision keys promptly when compromised?
questions.evaluation_focus: Remove or deprovision keys when compromised

questions.prompt: Are key revocation and compromise processes reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate regular revocation and compromise process review
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular key revocation and compromise process review

capability_questions.capability_name: Cloud KMS and machine identity key governance

questions.prompt: Is cloud KMS usage governed across cloud providers (for example AWS KMS, Azure Key Vault, Google Cloud KMS)?
questions.evaluation_focus: Governed cloud KMS usage across cloud providers

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have BYOK (bring your own key) or HYOK (hold your own key) policies for cloud encryption?
questions.evaluation_focus: BYOK and HYOK policies for cloud encryption

questions.prompt: Are workload and service keys managed with machine identity attribution in cloud KMS?
questions.intent: Evaluate workload key lifecycle in cloud KMS
questions.evaluation_focus: Workload and service key lifecycle in cloud KMS

questions.prompt: Are human-administered keys separated from machine-managed keys in policy and platform configuration?
questions.intent: Evaluate separation of human and machine keys
questions.evaluation_focus: Separation of human-administered and machine-managed keys
